com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class POSLinkIcc

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkIcc

  • public class POSLinkIcc
extends java.lang.Object
    About the API of the POS IC card. This API is for Pax Android devices only, such as A920.
    Add <uses-permission android:name="com.pax.permission.ICC"/> in Manifests when turn on Permission Check.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void autoResp(byte slot, boolean isAutoResp)
      Configure IsoCommand method to decidewhether sends 'Get Response command automatically or not.
      void close(byte slot)
      Power off the specified IC card in the card slot
      boolean detect(byte slot)
      Check whether card is insertedin specified slot.
      static POSLinkIcc getInstance(Context context)
      Create an POSLinkIcc instance.
      byte[] init(byte slot)
      Reset IC card and return the content of answer toreset
      ApduRespInfo isoCommandByApdu(byte slot, ApduSendInfo apduSendInfo)
      IC card operation function.
      void light(boolean onOff)
      Light controller of inserted IC card.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static POSLinkIcc getInstance(Context context)
        Create an POSLinkIcc instance.
        Parameters:
        context -
        Returns:
        POSLinkIcc object

      • init

        public byte[] init(byte slot)
            throws PaxIccException
        Reset IC card and return the content of answer toreset
        Parameters:
        slot - the number of card channel which should be initialized.
        Returns:
        Card reset response. (At least 33 bytes of space is required), the content is length (1 byte) + reset response content [output]
        Throws:
        PaxIccException

      • close

        public void close(byte slot)
           throws PaxIccException
        Power off the specified IC card in the card slot
        Parameters:
        slot - the number of card channel which should be close
        Throws:
        PaxIccException

      • autoResp

        public void autoResp(byte slot,
                     boolean isAutoResp)
              throws PaxIccException
        Configure IsoCommand method to decidewhether sends 'Get Response command automatically or not.
        Parameters:
        slot - the number of card channel which should be initialized
        isAutoResp -

        •true -- send automatically

        •false -- does not send automatically

        Throws:
        PaxIccException

      • detect

        public boolean detect(byte slot)
               throws PaxIccException
        Check whether card is insertedin specified slot. In-place check will take place for No.0-1 slots. Power-on and resetting will take place forNo. 2-5 slots.
        Parameters:
        slot - the number of card channel which should be initialized
        Returns:

        •true:Card-inserted

        •false:No card

        Throws:
        PaxIccException

      • light

        public void light(boolean onOff)
           throws PaxIccException
        Light controller of inserted IC card.
        Parameters:
        onOff -

        •true -- Light's on

        •false -- Light's off

        Throws:
        PaxIccException

      • isoCommandByApdu

        public ApduRespInfo isoCommandByApdu(byte slot,
                                     ApduSendInfo apduSendInfo)
                              throws PaxIccException
        IC card operation function. Thisfunction supports IC card universal interface protocol (T=0 and T=1).
        Parameters:
        slot - the number of card channel which should be initialized
        apduSendInfo - ApduSendInfo
        Returns:
        Receiving data structure of ICC.ApduRespInfo
        Throws:
        PaxIccException
